title: asperula oligantha var. gunnii
intro: Asperula oligantha var. gunnii, also known as Woodruff, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, Woodruff has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been linked to several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Woodruff is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
